Bash(python -c "from titan_veritas.db.connection import Database; db=Database.get_instance\(\); r=db.execute\(''SELECT COUNT\(*\) as c FROM candidate''\).fetchone\(\); print\(f''Total: {r[""c""]}''\); r2=db.execute\(''SELECT COUNT\(*\) as c FROM candidate WHERE is_filtered_out=0''\).fetchone\(\); print\(f''Active: {r2[""c""]}''\); r3=db.execute\(''SELECT COUNT\(*\) as c FROM candidate WHERE tier=3 AND is_filtered_out=0''\).fetchone\(\); print\(f''Tier3 active: {r3[""c""]}''\); r4=db.execute\(''SELECT COUNT\(DISTINCT last_name\) as c FROM candidate WHERE is_filtered_out=0''\).fetchone\(\); print\(f''Distinct surnames: {r4[""c""]}''\); r5=db.execute\(''SELECT COUNT\(*\) as c FROM candidate WHERE cemla_hit=1''\).fetchone\(\); print\(f''CEMLA hits: {r5[""c""]}''\); r6=db.execute\(''SELECT COUNT\(*\) as c FROM candidate WHERE ellis_island_hit=1''\).fetchone\(\); print\(f''Ellis hits: {r6[""c""]}''\)")
